# N1KO-STATE 1.0.16

This release focuses on reliability, lower idle overhead, safer fan control, and a more accessible settings/popover experience.

## Improvements

- Reduced unnecessary sampling when the popover is open by respecting the modules that are actually visible.
- Lowered SmartBattery and process-list refresh cost while keeping visible data responsive.
- Switched long-window history sampling to real elapsed time so refresh profiles no longer skew history cadence.
- Improved settings-window lifecycle so Settings can be reopened reliably and About can route to the Advanced tab.
- Added a clear empty state when no popover modules are enabled.
- Improved keyboard and VoiceOver semantics for popover header actions, chart range controls, accent colors, alert sliders, module toggles, and fan controls.
- Added a manual fan-control confirmation so accidental clicks do not immediately override macOS automatic fan management.
- Deferred notification permission prompts until alerts are enabled instead of prompting during first launch.

## Fixes

- Fixed history loading so persisted buffers are not mutated without synchronization.
- Fixed SmartBattery detail updates so background IORegistry reads publish state on the main thread.
- Fixed alert arming so notification rules are not consumed before notification permission exists.
- Fixed menu-bar behavior when all metrics are disabled by showing the brand state instead of stale fallback CPU/GPU values.
- Fixed helper dirty-marker handling so failed fan writes do not leave stale recovery markers and clean daemon shutdown clears the marker.
- Fixed battery visibility initialization so menu-bar battery settings reconcile after the battery monitor starts.

## Notes

- This build keeps fan safety conservative: automatic fan control is restored on quit, helper disconnect, daemon shutdown, or thermal safety events.
